Thanks for contributing! Keep changes focused and match the surrounding style.

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? Link issues with "Closes #123". -->

Closes #

## How it was verified

<!-- What did you run/test? -->

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Relevant `npm run test` cases pass
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (or explain why not)
- [ ] Changes are additive/backward-compatible where they touch the database or shared analytics types

<!-- Do not require a local production build. GitHub CI owns npm run verify. -->

## Automated review follow-up

- [ ] I addressed or explained any material Codex/Copilot findings (if a reviewer ran)
- [ ] All review conversations are resolved

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything to look at closely, trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots for UI changes. -->

---

<sub>AI reviews are advisory. The required gates are a green `verify`, resolved conversations, and maintainer approval. See `AGENTS.md`.</sub>
